description: Curated snippets for local retrieval on this portfolio only — not a general knowledge base.

chunks.title: Campus-Sync Navigation
chunks.body: Research-led campus navigation redesign with measurable gains in wayfinding and task success on the case study page.

chunks.body: Accessibility-focused UX research and redesign documented with methods, artifacts, and outcomes on the full case study.

chunks.title: Mercedes Interactive Service Manual
chunks.body: Interactive repair-guidance research and prototyping, including usability validation, summarized on the Mercedes service manual case study.

chunks.title: Skills & methods
chunks.body: Chandan works at the intersection of human factors, UX research, and product design — see About for background and how research informs design decisions.
